ModMetaData.name: Firefly
ModMetaData.author: Stixxy
ModMetaData.description:
Fillion remembers. She tracks the choices your colony makes, the lives you affect, the deals you break. Give it time — what you've done will come back to you.
An LLM-powered storyteller that accumulates your colony's history across an entire playthrough and shapes events around it. Requires your own API key (OpenRouter recommended).
